programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Agent Ethan Hunt and his elite team go underground after a bombing implicates them as terrorists. While trying to clear their name, the team uncovers a plot to start a nuclear war.

programme.title: Ben-Hur (2016)
programme.desc: Lew Wallace's epic novel of redemption is at the heart of this rousing adaptation following an accused nobleman (Jack Huston) who survives years of slavery to take vengeance on the friend (Toby Kebbell) who betrayed him. Morgan Freeman also stars.

programme.title: Rogue Warfare
programme.desc: Stephen Lang (Avatar) stars in the action-packed Rogue Warfare. An international team of highly trained special ops soldiers is assembled for a covert mission in Afghanistan.

programme.title: Rogue Warfare: The Hunt
programme.desc: The second installment of the action-packed Rogue Warfare trilogy returns with its most daring mission yet. When the leader of an elite team of soldiers is captured by terrorists, it is up to the team to find and rescue him before it's too late.

programme.title: Rogue Warfare: Death of a Nation
programme.desc: Stephen Lang returns for the final chapter in the action-packed trilogy. When an elite team of soldiers uncover plans for a deadly bomb set to detonate in 36 hours, they must race against time to find it and defeat their enemy once and for all.

programme.title: Rogue Warfare
programme.desc: Stephen Lang (Avatar) stars in the action-packed Rogue Warfare. An international team of highly trained special ops soldiers is assembled for a covert mission in Afghanistan.

programme.title: Wild Wild East
programme.desc: The Annapolis Valley is the Wild Wild East’s most important agricultural center. We dive into the hive to explore the complex social structures of hardworking honeybees.

programme.title: Deep White
programme.desc: Deep White explores why sharks attack and studies ways to train sharks in order to prevent future attacks. Sharks are highly intelligent and are able to perform complex tasks. Sharks develop strong bonds with their trainers.

programme.title: Shark Divers Part 2
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums.

programme.title: Wildest India: India's Lost World
programme.desc: North-east India is an anthropological paradise; there is no other place on Earth with so many different ethnic groups. The forest are filled with mysterious tribes whose lives are dictated by the rain and the seasonal fruits of the forest.

programme.title: Epic Animal Encounters
programme.desc: Massive predators are caught on camera fighting over food.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef: A Living Treasure
programme.desc: The Great Barrier Reef is the only place in the world where ancient rainforest meets a tropical reef, with the coastal fringe supporting a variety of unique wildlife.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef: A Living Treasure
programme.desc: Stretching 2,300 kilometres down the northeast coast of Queensland, the reef is home to over 900 islands each with their own unique biology and fauna.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson has a close call with an alligator and checks out the most venomous rattlesnake in the world.

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: Altruism, an act that bestows a benefit on the recipient while conferring a cost to the actor, is one of the central paradoxes of evolution.

programme.title: The Trouble With Wolves
programme.desc: Death threats, court battles, and an iconic endangered species in middle; The Trouble With Wolves takes an up-close look at the most heated and controversial wildlife conservation debate of our time.

programme.title: Wild Wild East
programme.desc: It’s Halifax through the eyes of its wildest residents. During the day, squirrels and chipmunks compete for territory in the city park. At night, Halifax’s raccoons invade backyards and seagulls scour the streets for pizza.

programme.title: Great Lakes Wild
programme.desc: Vilified for years, the Massassauga Rattlesnake used to be an animal that even nature lovers would kill on contact. Now that they’re endangered, people are realizing just how important they are. But is it too late to save them?

programme.title: Wild Wild East
programme.desc: The North American wilderness is smaller and more fragmented than ever. Yet somehow, the white-tailed deer population has exploded. White-tailed deer were once totally eliminated from some parts of their range.

programme.title: Lemur Street
programme.desc: When a gang of three adolescent males enter the reserve Graveyard dominant male Blake is forced to defend Topaz's honour. Low-ranking Liberty meanwhile loses her son Hogarth. Can the youngster find his way home alone? Some surprises lie in wait.

programme.title: Sharks
programme.desc: Exceptional imagery depicts these amazing sea dwellers in a new and different way, as they've been around long before dinosaurs. The white shark, the hammerhead shark, or the whale shark can all be seen at a first-hand experience.

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: Set in Awash National Park, here we follow the life of a clan of Hamadryas Baboons. It’s a closely-knit group where aggression plays a vital role in ensuring strong family bonds and structure.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Mexico
programme.desc: In Mexico's Copper Canyon Adventurer Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive by using traditional cave shelters, fishing without lines or nets, and finding scorpions and grubs to eat.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Participants explore new - and risky - food sources in Mongolia. As the survivalists begin to settle into their new remote surroundings, they realize they're not the only predators on the prowl.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The survivalists begin to face threats as they work to secure food and finish their shelters. One participant is confronted by one of Mongolia's deadliest predators, while another fights a debilitating illness.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: As Vancouver Island is pummeled by torrential rains, the remaining teams scramble to avoid freezing floodwaters. One team attempts a massive construction project that could be their key to survival.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The three remaining teams scramble for long-term advantage. One pair runs themselves ragged with an elaborate shelter build, while another faces hazards from the freezing Pacific waters on their own small craft.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: On their first date, a young woman and her friend are shot execution style at a deserted reservoir; two strangers' lives collide when they are caught up in a deadly train collision.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: A young woman is abducted and put through a horrifying eight day ordeal by a man who forces her to live inside a metal box.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: A young mother is attacked and strangled by a man she meets at a party. A snowmobiler survives a series of avalanches but loses eight of his friends.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Scrambling to prepare leaving Barrow the men sell the extra watercraft for additional fuel money. The team experience the worst ocean conditions in two seasons and get stranded at an abandoned DEW line site.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Completely out of fuel the team is stuck waiting for the weather to clear and a plane to resupply the expedition. The men hunt for caribou and cook fresh meat on an open fire.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy treks deep into the Colorado Rockies to bow hunt for elk.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy faces bad luck and bad weather as he hunts the wild Rocky Mountains for elk.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy hunts for whitetail deer in the Rocky Mountains behind his cabin.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy returns to New Mexico to hunt for mule deer, but they're not the only animal that he runs into.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Mark and the crew are in Utah near Zion National Park to go canyoneering!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Get ready, you're about to watch the crew enter the kill zone with some great white sharks!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Will the jaws of gators attack the crew underwater or are these reptilian predators simply misunderstood? Get ready to find out!

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods
programme.desc: An electrical lineman tasks Steve with customizing his company's truck.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods
programme.desc: Steve builds a custom vehicle for a two-year-old boy with cancer.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery op Steve Hodges gets the call that a truck is stranded in a park. The stricken vehicle is stuck on a wet and muddy field that has become incredibly soft due to heavy rainfall.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A 15 tonne Water Tanker has been swallowed by a Sinkhole in Wokingham town centre. Lantern lass Merrie rushes to the scene where her concern is what might lurk within.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Rookie Recovery Op Joe has a challenge on his hands when a delivery van slides off the road, ending up precariously balanced on the verge between a farm track and a muddy field.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: In Burton On Trent, Lee is in a race against time to rescue a coach that's careered off a road and straight into a hedgerow.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: In a muddy Leicestershire field, recovery op Simon is confronted with not one, but two trucks in need of rescuing. The first got stuck following its sat nav, while the second came a cropper trying to pull it free.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client? Then, Matt and Froy attempt to repo a DeLorean.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, it's up, up, and away, for Lou, Froy, and Matt. All of their skills are tested when they attempt to take down not one, but two hot air balloons. Then, Lou and Froy find themselves in the wrong part of town, repo'ing a sports car.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt team up with Eva, an alluring lending agent, who sets up a sting to repo a limousine from its delinquent owner.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy arrive on the scene to a repo a car that's been refitted to run on biodiesel and are shocked to see that its owner shares some of Sonia's features.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lyndah are faced with a choice. Do they attempt to reclaim a burnt-out husk of a car from its high-flying owners, or do they just give up and go home?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy venture into one of the city's most dangerous neighborhoods, only to find a debtor ready to defend his ride by pumping it full of lead, with no concern for who gets caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lyndah is put in a tough situation - she has to control a sobbing, cop-calling debtor and turn away Frankie's unwanted and inappropriate advances - all at the same time. Then, Matt and Froy have two problems on their hands.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah probably need to schedule a trip to the dentist after Lou's tooth gets knocked out in the course of a tense confrontation with two irate debtors. Then, Frankie seriously blows a routine voluntary repo when the owner smells something

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: FBI

programme.title: FBI

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A loving husband and father of two, Jim Russo, is kidnapped after accidentally getting involved in illegal dealings far beyond what he imagined.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a Wall Street investor is murdered, the team is led to an insider-trading ring that uses unconventional methods to gain information.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a board member of a soon-to-be-public medical tech company is murdered, the team tries to find out who had the most to gain from his death.

programme.title: The Agency

programme.title: The Agency
programme.desc: Dr. Blake arrives from Langley and is put to a test by Martian and Henry. A spooked source threatens to put an operation at risk. Danny's cover is put in play. Martian, overtaken by events, begins to question Sami's motives.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of a local television weatherman who goes missing after he shows up to work bleeding from his side.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing teen who disappears after her mother picks her up from school. Jack and Samantha's relationship hits a speed bump. ADAM KAUFMAN guest stars.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing bar owner who possesses a religious statue which is believed to create miracles. THOMAS CALABRO ("Melrose Place") guest stars as Eddie Gilroy.

programme.title: Four Brothers
programme.desc: After their adoptive mother is murdered during a grocery store hold-up, the Mercer bros reunite to take the matter into their own hands. As they track down the killer, they quickly realize that their old ways of doing business have new consequences.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin'
programme.desc: Following a near-fatal gun battle, Marcus recalls his journey from orphaned street kid from the Bronx to making his mark in the drug trade to teaming up with a fellow ex-con (Terrence Howard) for his shot at becoming a successful rap artist.

programme.title: Heist
programme.desc: A jewel thief's nephew is sent along on a heist to ensure a longtime partner in crime stays honest about the division of the loot.

programme.desc: After their adoptive mother is murdered during a grocery store hold-up, the Mercer bros reunite to take the matter into their own hands. As they track down the killer, they quickly realize that their old ways of doing business have new consequences.

programme.title: LUV

programme.title: Fargo

programme.title: Bound
programme.desc: Caesar’s a guy who launders money for the mob. What’s the last thing that would come between a sleazy wise guy like Caesar and that money? A couple of women with brains to die for and bodies to match.

programme.title: Hard Eight
programme.desc: John, a half-bright loser stranded in Reno, is down to his last few bucks when Sydney, taking pity on him, buys him breakfast and offers him a few tips on making money in the casinos. Two years later, John has become Sydney's partner.

programme.title: Showgirls

programme.title: Angel Eyes
programme.desc: After meeting under extraordinary life-and-death circumstances, a Chicago police officer (Lopez) and a lost soul named Catch (Caviezel) fall in love. While uncovering the truth about Catch, she is forced to deal with the secrets of her own past. Rated-R

programme.title: Lions for Lambs

programme.title: Cloverfield
programme.desc: Five young New Yorkers face a life or death struggle in order to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares

programme.title: The F Word (UK)
programme.desc: GORDON RAMSAY challenges CHRIS MOYLES to cook in a Fast Food race against his local takeaway. Today's brigade are four Estate Agents, cooking sauteed black pudding, sage and onion rosti and soft boiled eggs, breadcrumbed veal escalope and a tiramisu.

programme.title: The F Word (UK)

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati stops at a couple of beloved restaurants in Guadalajara for two classic dishes. At Super Menuderia Cano, she learns the secrets to their menudo that’s so good people line up down the block waiting to get in.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: This week we're back catching up with Sadie Yukon and Simon Gwillian, a picky pair who really put us through the mill.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: This week, we're back in Yorkshire catching up with lotto millionaires Roger and Lara Griffiths. Just over a year ago, this lucky pair scooped almost two million quid on the lottery and were desperate to splash out on a swanky new pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: With the market constantly shifting, there's no such thing as a "simple search" anymore. Our dynamic duo will have to work harder than ever before to make sure they come up with the goods.

programme.title: Carrie (1976)
programme.desc: In this all-time horror classic, Carrie (Sissy Spacek) is a loner with no confidence and no friends. When pushed too far, Carrie becomes a vengeance-seeking powerhouse who causes all hell to break loose in a frenzy of blood, fire and brimstone!

programme.title: Cujo
programme.desc: While Donna and Vic Trenton struggle to save their rocky marriage, their son Tad befriends the loveable 200-lb St. Bernard who belongs to their mechanic.

programme.title: Children of the Corn
programme.desc: Based on the classic short story by Stephen King, CHILDREN OF THE CORN is a longtime horror favorite that has spawned six sequels and many imitations. See how it all started.

programme.title: The Dark Half
programme.desc: A writer undergoes an operation that reveals a twin in his brain. He begins a double writing life, using a pseudonym for his disreputable best-sellers. When the pseudonym discovers he is to be eradicated, he goes on a murderous rampage.

programme.title: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: Camp Crystal Lake has been shuttered for over 20 years due to several vicious and unsolved murders. The camp's new owner and seven young counselors are readying the property for re-opening despite warnings of a "death curse" by local residents.

programme.title: Friday the 13th Part II
programme.desc: Five years after the bloodbath at Camp Crystal, all that remains is the legend of Jason and his demented mother, who had murdered seven camp counselors. At a nearby summer camp, the new counselors are unconcerned about the warnings to stay away.

programme.title: Friday the 13th - Part III
programme.desc: Ignoring Camp Crystal Lake’s bloody legacy, one by one they fall victim to the maniacal Jason who stalks them at every turn...

programme.title: Gridiron Gang (2006)
programme.desc: Sean Porter (Johnson) is a frustrated probation officer as most of the kids he oversees end up back in prison or dead. Desperate to make a difference, he devises a plan to teach discipline and responsibility through football.

programme.title: Walking Tall (2004)
programme.desc: Chris Vaughn, a retired soldier who returns to his hometown only to discover the place he grew up is now overrun with crime, drugs and violence. Enlisting the help of his old pal, Chris gets elected Sheriff and fights to clean up his hometown.

programme.title: Be Cool
programme.desc: John Travolta is back as Chili Palmer in this sequel to "Be Cool." With an all-star cast that includes Uma Thurman and The Rock, "Be Cool" is the hilarious tale about a gangster-turned-music-mogul...and what it takes to be number one with a bullet!

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: A graduate student and his girlfriend set out on a cross-country road trip to research a book they are writing on serial killers. Along the way, they pick up an ex-con and his girlfriend who will take them on a ride they'll never forget.

programme.title: Orange County
programme.desc: Shaun is content to be a bright but unfocused surf slacker, until the day he discovers a novel by acclaimed author Martin Skinner. Inspired, he suddenly leaves behind Orange County to study creative writing Stanford University.

programme.title: Envy
programme.desc: A man becomes increasingly jealous of his friend's newfound success.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso huyente inventa excusas para evitar la cárcel. Un conductor durmiéndose pide que la policía no le diga a su esposa. Una llamada de allanamiento causa un tormento en un vecindario.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un delincuente corre cuando oficiales lo ven en un lugar prohibido. Dos jóvenes se tardan en detener a un ladrón de bicicletas y llaman a la policía. Un problema domestico se complica malignamente.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre rebelde intenta despistar a los oficiales. Un conductor bien vestido quiebra barricadas. Los oficiales se sorprenden cuando una llamada doméstica da un giro inesperado.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Viendo una buena oportunidad un sospechoso va a las carreras. Se atrapa a un hombre con objetos desagradables. Se atrapa a un hombre en una operación encubierta, aun así, no admite su crimen.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía intenta atrapar a un sospechoso por robo de vehículo armado. La policía llega a una escena caótica y un testigo aclara las cosas. Un ciclista rezongón culpa su forma de ser en animé.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Alguien con un corazón roto maneja peligrosamente. Se atrapa a un miembro de la Asociación de padres y maestros dando un mal ejemplo. Seguir adelante es difícil para una mujer con un pasado malo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Es como una reunión cuando la policía alcanza a alguien que reconoce. La amante de un hombre hace problemas con la esposa. Los oficiales batallan con dos sospechosos que no dan respuestas concretas.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre buscado huye y la policía va muy cerca detrás de él. La policía persigue a una persona manejando nerviosamente. Un retén arriesga a un auto lleno de gente que tiene mucho que ocultar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales se ven obligados a usar guantes cuando detienen a un sospechoso asustado con una condición grave de la piel. Un futuro papá trata de correr. Un rapero empieza a cantar cuando lo esposan.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se somete a un hombre que está convencido que un animal salvaje lo sigue. Un cumpleaños se descontrola rápidamente cuando se involucran las armas. La policía ayuda con un problema domestico volátil.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un barrio tranquilo se interrumpe. Un hombre desafortunado trata de ocultar su culpabilidad al tirar unas prendas. Hay puñetazos cuando un dueño de tienda enfrenta a alguien que le robó.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía encuentra más que golosinas en el bolsillo de un sospechoso. Un conductor armado da un relato no creíble para justificar su arma. Una discusión termina con una llamada a Control Animal.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre llama a la policía cuando ve un robo en la licorería. Un conductor pierde a su amiga cuando le roba su camioneta. Los oficiales le sugieren a un joven que sea mejor ejemplo para su hermano.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía evita un allanamiento posiblemente mortal en una casa. Un pasajero tenso empieza a rezongar antes de que los oficiales digan una palabra. La policía busca la bicicleta robada de un joven.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales persiguen a un ciclista casi desnudo por todo el vecindario. Un sospechoso hace una serie de movimientos equivocados frente a su novia. La policía encuentra a una mujer en un armario.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor quiere regresar a casa para un cumpleaños. Un hombre teme confesar por qué sus huellas están en un arma. Un viaje para comprar comida de perro se convierte en un encuentro con la policía.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor atrevido causa una persecución loca. Un pollero tiene una explicación poco clara de los objetos descubiertos en su carro. Un hombre impulsivo no reconocer sus errores fácilmente.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso que conduce ebrio dice que sólo salió a comprar un bocadillo. Una pareja se delata cuando la policía hace preguntas. La policía detiene a alguien que cree que se le tendió una trampa.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre intenta pelear con todo el vecindario. Un fugitivo está convencido de que la policía le dijo que se fuera en su bicicleta. Una mamá joven con problemas tiene una segunda oportunidad.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un motociclista causa una persecución por las calles. Ni un carro que no prende impide que un hombre corra de la policía. Un conductor no logra evadir a la policía y se disculpa raramente con su novia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Durante una parada de tránsito un sospechoso decide huir a campo través. Una mujer rehúsa mentir por el amigo de su hijo. Se captura en video a un hombre escondiendo artículos en un lugar obvio.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se desmiente a un sospechoso cuando su víctima presenta un video de seguridad. El miedo le gana a un conductor cuando trata de escapar. Un viaje de noche al mercado termina en llanto.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 travels to a planet to investigate a machine that induces narcotic pleasure. But when they try to leave the planet, they are overcome with debilitating withdrawal symptoms, forcing them to stay. Can they free themselves from this addiction?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team prepares for the worst as board a Wraith hive ship over Atlantis. They're surprised to find the Wraith crew in stasis when a malfunction on the hive ship releases the remaining crew… who have been cannibalizing one another for food.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When Dr. Jennifer Keller is observed behaving very strangely, extensive testing reveals nothing abnormal. But McKay’s investigation leads him to suspect that Dr. Keller and Neela Casol, a notorious criminal, have switched consciousnesses.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: In an alternate universe, Detective John Sheppard is with the Las Vegas Police Department and begins to investigate a strange series of murders believed to be the work of a bizarre serial killer. Has life changed or is this a dangerous Wraith plot?

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Puzzled over the hive ship's sudden departure, the team picks up a weak subspace signal in Wraith code. Once deciphered, their worst fears are realized. The Wraith message contains a familiar set of coordinates. The hive ship is on its way to Earth!

programme.desc: After Nester moves away from home, Momma forces Scaredy to be her new son. Then, Dave's personality changes when he gets a new motorcycle.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Tensions erupt between Jade & Sean at Kloie's birthday dinner. Leah attempts virtual learning with all three girls. Kailyn navigates a medical issue with Creed. Briana tries to put aside her anger with Devoin for Nova's birthday.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade's frustrations force her to break up with Sean. Kailyn tries to co-parent through the stress of virtual learning. Chelsea gets busier as COVID-19 numbers spike in South Dakota. Leah clears the air with Corey about her struggles with addiction.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah steps in when tensions between the twins boil over. Kailyn is forced to navigate the fallout of strong statements she made about Javi. Jade attempts to rebuild a positive co-parenting relationship with Sean.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea makes a difficult decision about her future. Leah withdraws Gracie from cheer in order to keep Ali safe. Kailyn tries to make amends. Jade deals with Sean's literal and figurative messes after he breaks her window. Briana cuts DeVoin.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: TM2's newest mom, Ashley, takes an anniversary trip with her boyfriend, Bar, who's got a big surprise. Leah receives life altering news about her health. After moving back to Dover, Kail says goodbye to her old house and bittersweet memories.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Ashley gives Bar an answer, but past family drama may dampen their dream; a stressful move threatens to sour Jade's fresh start; Luis asks to see Stella for the first time in months.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: After a covid exposure at the girls' school, Leah has to make some difficult decisions. Devoin lets Nova down and Briana must pick up the pieces. Jade wants to take things slow with Sean, but he has other ideas.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Sean proposes, but Jade's not sure how to respond. Leah is forced into quarantine when Jeremy tests positive for covid. Ashley plans a surprise party for Bar. Briana introduces her man to the cameras. Kail helps Isaac find an interest that he likes.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail invites Devoin on her podcast. Jade decides to get plastic surgery in Miami, so Briana visits to coach her through her anxiety. Bar goes to court for his outstanding DUI charges. Leah's twins turn 11.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade gets plastic surgery but her recovery turns dangerous, and Briana tries to help her as the situation escalates. Ashley juggles even more when she finds out she has to suddenly move. Leah gets news that will help Ali be more independent.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade's recovery gets even rockier when tensions rise between Sean and her parents. Ashley and Bar make a tough wedding decision as he faces another court date. Leah plans a birthday party for Addie, hoping Jeremy can make it.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade plans to fly home, but Briana tries to convince her to come back to Orlando with her instead. Kail reveals heartbreaking challenges around a recent medical diagnosis. When Addie struggles with online learning, Leah makes a tough decision.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade recovers at Briana's house, but has to make a hard decision about her family. Leah tries to balance Ali and Aleeah's unique needs. Kail juggles three different coparenting relationships. Bar starts college while Ashley plans a birthday surprise.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Ashley and Bar grapple racist backlash. Kloie's behavior wedges a divide between Jade and Sean. Briana travels for surgery, but returns to something shocking. Leah meets her doctor in hopes of getting answers about the lump on her breast.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco llega al restaurante y Armando queda impresionado, Reyes culpa a Rosario del atentado por perseguirlo. Martín le dice a Norma que Dínora, Gabriela y Fernando quieren separarla de Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar y Jimena alargan su divorcio, él le pide que ayude a Juan, lo mismo hace Franco con Sara, las dos prometen hablar con Norma. Rosario reconoce que su matrimonio es un fracaso.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando se queja con Gabriela de la paliza que le dieron los Reyes, Sara revela que él la atacó y le dice a Norma que su mamá y Dínora buscan alejarla de Juan. Óscar descubre a Eva.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma renuncia al consultorio, le asusta la cercanía de Fernando con Juan David, también Ruth se retira de la Casa de Modas por presión de su mamá. Juan se niega a asistir a la cena de Dínora.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Con el resultado del ADN, Juan sabe que Pablo es su verdadero padre. Paula se hace un examen de embarazo. José sigue a Gaspar, mientras lleva a Simón con Beatriz. Los hermanos discuten. Julieta le hace jurar a Juan que nunca la dejará.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José regresa a Simón con Beatriz, pero no renuncia a quitárselo legalmente. Le pide a sus hermanos que testifiquen a su favor y enfurece cuando ve que no lo apoyan. Modesto exige la verdad. Emilio al ser descubierto cuenta la verdad sobre su hijo.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan quiere saber su origen. José amenaza a Paula con su embarazo. Emilio sufre un ataque cerebrovascular. Julieta le cuenta a sus padres acerca de su enfermedad. Rosario continúa buscando la cara del violador y quiere descubrirlo.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula decide contarle toda la verdad a Juan. Sofía le ruega a su hija que se vayan de la hacienda. Juan está pendiente de la salud de su padre. Rosario reconoce a su violador. Modesto le confiesa a Berta que Juan y Paula son hermanos de sangre.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Patricia hace un discurso memorable contra Antonia y despierta la admiración de todos. Aníbal pronto estará de alta, pero le ofrece dinero al médico para que lo deje en el hospital. Lucho Vampa le roba a Antonia y Rodrigo corta relaciones con ella.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro golpea con una rabia descontrolada a Macario y termina en la comisaría. Por ahora, no podrá salir de prisión. Constanza y Gastón encuentran un sobre con la llave de una bóveda de un banco y una tarjeta electrónica con la foto de Antonia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucho e Irene descubren que Antonia es la dueña del prostíbulo La casa de las muñecas. Alejandro está encarcelado en el mismo lugar que el Lagarto. Rodrigo pide una orden de registro para entrar en casa de Guerra.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Gastón cuenta en su programa de radio que Antonia Guerra es la dueña del prostíbulo. Antonia hace firmar a Aníbal un documento donde pone sus bienes a nombre de ella, para protegerlos de Constanza.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma renuncia al consultorio, le asusta la cercanía de Fernando con Juan David, también Ruth se retira de la Casa de Modas por presión de su mamá. Juan se niega a asistir a la cena de Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora tiene una trampa para comprometer a Juan, pero Franco y Óscar planean otra para ella. Ruth le cuenta a Raquel lo que dijo Calixto sobre su madre y Rosario le pide el divorcio a Armando.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A vegetarian racer struggles with a difficult decision when faced with a Norwegian delicacy, and Teams face their fears of heights during a gut-wrenching Roadblock.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers struggle to complete their creative detours before putting in a proper day's work in the fields, where they discover the key to potato farming is manure.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are clowning around when they learn a traditional Russian circus act, but it's no joke when multiple teams make a critical error and misread a clue, jeopardizing their positions in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Following a huge mistake, one Racer makes an important decision that will impact their team beyond the finish line and for the rest of their lives.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tension among the teams runs high when, for the first time ever, two teams are U-turned and have to complete an extra task, jeopardizing their chances of making it to the final four.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After Racers become violently ill during a challenge, the stress of the Race finally catches up to one team as a Racer threatens to qui.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams travel to South Korea where they battle it out on water and ice to make the final three.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final three teams soar to new heights over Southern California, competing in the final leg for a shot at the million-dollar prize and, for two teams, the chance to become the first ever all-female team to win the series.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven former Teams who fell short of winning the $1 million prize during their first Race around the globe will return for another shot.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams dressed as kangaroos continue through Australia where one Racer reverts to old habits as tempers start to flare, and another Team breaks down in tears from utter exhaustion.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While in Japan, one team's hopes are shattered after a car crash jolts them to the back of the pack, and Racers get down and dirty in a pile of frigid mud.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The nine remaining teams depart from Commodore Perry's Landing in Kurihama, Japan and travel to their next destination in a race around the world for one million dollars.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The pressure builds when a prehistoric Roadblock pushes one Racer over the edge and a Double U-turn causes panic among the teams as they race to avoid elimination.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by a swarming sea of people on the congested streets of India, one team narrowly dodges a traffic collision while another's clumsiness threatens to spoil their chances of acing the Detour.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee's original song about Mayberry is a hit when it's played by a rock n' roll star on his television show.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie feels inadequate when he meets Helen's niece who is athletically superior to him.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Goober blackballs county clerk Howard when he applies for membership in the Mayberry men's lodge.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The Mayberry barbershop quartet loses its tenor right before a big singing contest so Andy drafts an unsavory prisoner with a beautiful voice.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy umpires a crucial baseball game and becomes the town pariah.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee buys a blonde wig and upsets Andy and the rest of Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and the town of Mayberry undergo a trying experience when the hillbilly Darling family comes into a fortune of 300 dollars and are looking for wives.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Goober's friends convince him that his minor mishap has resulted in a severe case of whiplash and he promptly becomes a helpless invalid.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee and Howard both decide to run against each other for town council.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Helen Crump and her students convince a crotchety old school principal that today's youngsters aren't so different from his own generation.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie and his friend find an abandoned baby and they run into trouble when they innocently try to find it some new parents.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Town clerk Howard, a novice fisherman, tags along on the first day of the season and antagonizes the town's anglers by catching Old Sam, the legendary fish in the lake.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie accidentally ruins Aunt Bee's prize rose entry on the eve of the annual Mayberry flower show.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis and Howard nearly botch rescuing Andy who has been taken prisoner by a pair of desperate bank robbers.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Inarticulate Goober grows a beard and suddenly turns into a verbose philosopher.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The town's new doctor is shunned by all the Mayberry citizens until Andy shows his faith in the young physician by letting him remove Opie's tonsils.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and four of his levelheaded friends and relatives are taken in by a con man's get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy looks forward to eating a few snacks and spending an evening alone in the house but he finds he must eat three spaghetti dinners cooked by thoughtful friends.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy visits Barney Fife, now with the Raleigh police department, and makes a hero out of his bumbling former deputy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Detective Barney Fife pays a visit to his old hometown, the same day a glamorous movie star returns to Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's perennial romance with Helen is jolted a bit when Andy's old high school sweetheart moves back to town.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee allows her superstitions dictate her decision to be a brief co-owner of a Chinese restaurant.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Floyd decides to give up his Mayberry barbershop when Howard Sprague buys the building and raises the rent fifteen dollars a month.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Aunt Bee learn their ancestor was the state's biggest swindler, just before the town of Mayberry unveils his statue as a hero.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Helen writes a children's book that will be published and Andy faces the uncomfortable prospect of being the fiance of a famous writer.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Opie face the difficult problem of helping an old milk-wagon horse find contentment in retirement.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie insists on studying piano until he finds out that football practice and piano practice conflict.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Melting snow from the mountains creates a rushing flow of water into a valley just awakening for spring. Feel the crisp new season with Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the midst of a cold, wintry forest, Bob Ross gently places a magical little wooden shanty upon a bed of soft snow.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a walk with Bob Ross today, over a sweet old footbridge, across a little creek a'splashin' through the woodlands.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Relish the tranquility of valley waters gently falling into a quiet summer mere - smooth cliffs and trees frame this Bob Ross wonderland.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Magnificent jewels in an oval - this Bob Ross painting highlights countless numbers of colors in nature's sky and foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Imagine the peace and serenity of a home in the hollow, sheltered from the snow-covered mountains beyond! Travel with Bob Ross to just such a place.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses a little imagination and lots of colors to create this soft, luxurious early autumn lake scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Under the most glorious of skies, enjoy the rhythmic flow of deep sea waters crashing and splashing upon the surrounding rocks and cliffs - Bob Ross style!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the salt spray as Bob Ross paints ocean waves under abundant clouds, rolling in to spend their energy against sand and rock.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you to a beautiful lake in high country -- catch a glimpse of magnificent mountains, images echoed in the crystal clear water below.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Imagine yourself nestled in a Bob Ross cabin, hidden in the midst of the lush green forest surrounded by the sounds of nature.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross will fascinate you with this crimson winter scene, where cabin and snow are virtually undisturbed and the evergreens are full.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Rich, soft colors prove that fall has arrived! Join Bob Ross as he paints a quiet pond and surrounding foliage preparing themselves for a season of slumber.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross on a painting excursion along this beautiful scenic river - who knows what abundance of nature's wealth lies beyond!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you on a journey through the majestic forest where you can smell the sweet aroma of pines and taste cool mist in the air.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Towering mountains protect a lovely green river land, where gentle waters flow and silent breezes blow - another Bob Ross masterpiece to cherish.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: On a brisk quiet day, follow Bob Ross along a trail covered in fresh white snow, surrounded by warm colors and fuzzy bark trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack and Suzi are stunned to see the Great Migration in action as animals cross the Mara River into Tanzania's Serengeti National Park.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Living Fossils
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets some of the most ancient species living on Earth. Red pandas, hoatzins, koalas, crocodiles and pelicans!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a cold-blooded countdown! Crocodiles, Puff Adders, Sea Turtles, Caiman, Fer de Lance and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to Florida to meet some unexpected residents in the small town of Wauchula. Nestled among the orange groves, the Center for Great Apes is providing a loving home to dozens of orangutans and chimpanzees in need.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's in the Fiji Islands where he prepares for the most hands-on fishing trip of his life. Find out how the local people catch dinner using vines.Then they get a look at the top-secret methods used to create the most colorful pearls in the world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack meets up with amazing animal moms and the little ones they care for. A jaguar looking after her cub, a baby bear sleeping alongside its mom, a white rhino protecting her calf, a cheetah mom in South Africa and whole herd of elephant mammas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Deep in the Amazon River basin of Peru, Jack discovers a group of young conservationists working to save orphaned and injured animals at Taricaya Rescue Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Tree for Me
programme.desc: The sky’s the limit on today’s countdown. Tigers, orangutans, leopards, monkeys and more! Find out which high-flying animal is number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: He explores Hawaii's tropical shorelines down to its deep coral reefs while feeding live coral, diving with stingrays, tracking sea turtles and even joining a tiger shark for its birthday.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: The lush lands of Lope are home to rare and unique creatures like Forest Elephants, Forest Buffalo, and Red River Hogs. Plus loads of primates, and Jack has a close encounter with a gorilla!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi spend the day inside Tanzania's famed Ngorongoro Crater. The dormant volcano is home to hyena, lion, hippo, wildebeest, and loads of other creatures.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he braves the mighty Zambezi River in Zambia. Jack gets up and close and personal with the river's inhabitants on a kayaking adventure before heading off on a walking safari with lions and cheetahs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Deep in the Amazon, Jack ventures down the Napo River in search of Pink River Dolphins. He meets a baby Tapir rescued from the jungle, and comes face-to-face with a deadly Caiman.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets the remarkable rescued residents of The Farm Sanctuary in California. Loveable cows, goats, pigs and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack Hanna as he counts down the species that live their lives where other creatures fear to tread – right on the edge!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Journey into the bush in South Africa's Zululand with Jack, Kathaleen, and Zulu Nyala's rangers as they encounter rhinos on foot, and see the tactics rangers are using to wage war against poaching.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top of the Class
programme.desc: It's back to school for Jungle Jack as he continues his animal education in all sorts of interesting ways. From ranger school in Africa, to farrier school in Florida, and even zoo school. You never know what you'll learn on this Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: On the Caribbean Island of Dominica, Jack climbs up Morne Diablotin in search of the Sisserou, the world's most endangered parrot. Jack also encounters a large Boa Constrictor, then tries to keep pace with a “mountain” chicken.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the bustling city of Cape Town to the wild eco-systems in the African bush, Jack and his family discover how wildlife is faring in this beautiful country and meet the conservationists dedicated to protecting it all.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Far Out Sightings
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for some super rare animal sightings. A lake-loving elephant, desert-dwelling flamingos, goats enjoying island life, zebras in California and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack of All Trades
programme.desc: Caring for animals can be a big job! Join Jack for some on-the-job-training as he explores six incredible, dangerous and dirty animal jobs, like wrangling crocodiles, caring for elephants, herding cattle and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathleen travel to Winnipeg to experience the animals of Canada. At Oak Hammock Marsh, Jack visits a restored natural habitat that functions as a major stop for migratory birds.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack and Suzi as they meet some mighty meerkats living in California's desert, and visit a wolf sanctuary dedicated to saving the misunderstood species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they head into The Wilds of Ohio to visit a 10,000-acre conservation center that's home to over 25 species. They take a closer look at some very unique animals like Szechwan takins, Bactrian camels, rhinos, and even a cheetah!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: While in Barro Colorado, a dense forested island in Panama, Jack goes in search of a Harpy the world's largest eagle. The island is home to the famed Smithsonian Tropical Research Institute.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is eager to spot the animals on today’s countdown! Cheetah, painted dog, giraffe, a baby tapir and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is exploring the state of Florida from the bottom up! From Sea Turtles in the Florida Keys, to Gators in the Swamp, Manatees in Crystal River to Cheetahs and Rhinos living large at White Oak. Come along for some fun in the Florida sun!

programme.desc: A brilliant plain-Jane (Shelley Hack) becomes a fetching glamour gal with the help of Julie (Lauren Tewes), and falls in love with a man (Kevin Tighe) who has some mistaken ideas about her.

programme.desc: Isaac (Ted Lange) finds himself in a precarious position when he meets a beautiful former school chum (Bernadette Stanis) and her macho husband (Clifton Davis).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Romance and comic intrigue reign on the high seas as 25 engaged couples board the Pacific Princess to compete in a "Marriage-A-Thon Cruise." (Part 1)

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Darren McGavin, as dynamic promoter Larry Evans, recruits the services of "The Love Boat" to take the brides-and-grooms-to-be, who are competing for a house, a car, and $50,000 in cash, on a cruise that will wind up in a mass wedding in Acapulco. (Part 2)

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The Love Boat sails on a fantastic voyage to the most exciting ports in the Caribbean with a famed mystery writer (Pernell Roberts) who is willing to pay $100,000 to one of his hand-picked guests to solve the mystery of his missing nephew.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie is accused by a woman (Lani O'Grady) of stealing her fiance (Bart Braverman).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac causes comedic chaos when he convinces the crew to bolster his stagestruck aunt's (Isabel Sanford) ego, which turns her into an outrageous prima donna.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Capt. Stubing gets trapped in a love triangle by his old girlfriend (Sue Ann Langdon), now married to the ship's former captain (Mont model (Pamela Sue Martin) attempts to insure her privacy

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The First Lady of the Silent Screen, Lillian Gish, guest stars as Isaac's former English teacher, whom he tries to avoid.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A judge (Nancy Walker) finds herself attracted to a man (George Gobel) she has placed on probation for being married to three women at once.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Gopher and Doc battle for the affections of Gopher's gorgeous pen pal (Marie Laurin) who has come to live with him.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Doc has his arms full when he agrees to show his best friend's amorous wife (Jill St. John) a good time.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A nudist (Barbi Benton) gets help from an attorney (Peter Haskell) when she wants to bare it all on board.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Academy Award-winning actress Olivia de Havilland stars as the captain's aunt, who may take away his daughter, Vicki, when she boards with her husband (Joseph Cotten).

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Three hairs… microscopic fibers… a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.
